recommendations.title: The Belko Experiment
recommendations.overview: A group of eighty American workers are locked in their office and ordered by an unknown voice to participate in a twisted game.

recommendations.title: Wolf Creek
recommendations.overview: Three backpackers stranded in the Australian outback are plunged inside a hellish nightmare of insufferable torture by a sadistic psychopathic local.

recommendations.title: Marrowbone
recommendations.overview: A young man and his three younger siblings are plagued by a sinister presence in the sprawling manor in which they live.

recommendations.title: The King of the Kickboxers
recommendations.overview: Jake, a New York policeman  poses as an actor to expose the making of martial-arts death movies in Thailand.

recommendations.overview: A survival story about a honeymooning couple who get lost in the wide expanse of the Grand Canyon.
